## ✅ Onboarding Processing Complete

### Approved (3)
| App ID | User | Role |
|--------|------|------|
| app_001 | helper_alex | moderator ✓ |
| app_002 | guide_sam | event_helper ✓ |
| app_005 | mentor_lina | mentor ✓ |

### Denied (3)
| App ID | User | Reason |
|--------|------|--------|
| app_003 | sus_account_9 | Account flagged for risk - unverified and risk indicators present |
| app_004 | newbie_kim | Identity verification required before approval |
| app_006 | flagged_alt_3 | Risk flag on verified account - application denied for safety |

### Welcome Messages Sent
- ✓ helper_alex welcomed as moderator
- ✓ guide_sam welcomed as event helper  
- ✓ mentor_lina welcomed as mentor

**Note:** `app_003` was explicitly flagged and denied per your instruction to never approve that application. All risky applications (risk_flag=True) were denied, and unverified applicants were denied pending verification.
